data.body: RESOLVED via PR #31 (squash-merged to main, commit on main). Root cause: inbound differ read the wrong snapshot key — jira_fields.get('comments') (flat) instead of the Jira REST nested jira_fields['comment']['comments'] that the fetcher enriches via get_comment_map. Fix: _diff_comments_inbound now reads the nested 'comment' key, mirroring outbound_differ, with absent/malformed guards; all echo/dedup/ADF/blank behavior preserved. Tests: added test_inbound_differ_comment_snapshot_shape.py (RED before fix, mutation-checked) and corrected the fictional flat-shape fixtures in test_inbound_comments_diff.py. Live-verified on REB-5: with_comments went 0 -> 1. Note: the ticket's original 'needs a client/fetch' fix approach was moot — snapshot already carries comment data under 'comment'; this was purely a read-key bug.
